CustomField.description: Charge Rate per unit of utilization (such as Flight Hours - FH, Flight Cycles - FC, etc.), which is calculated to a precision of six decimal places. However, the Rate Base field, which has a precision of two decimal places, always supersedes this Charge Rate (keep it blank if you need more precision).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Charge Rate per unit of utilization (such as Flight Hours - FH, Flight Cycles - FC, etc.), which is calculated to a precision of six decimal places. However, the Rate Base field, which has a precision of two decimal places, always supersedes this Charge Rate (keep it blank if you need more precision)
CustomField.label: Rate (Precise)
